text: Neutron stars are so dense that a teaspoon of their material would weigh about 6 billion tons.
Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs that was still edible.
Octopuses have three hearts, blue blood, and nine brains.
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the construction of the Great Pyramid.
There are more possible iterations of a chess game than atoms in the observable universe.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
Sharks have been on Earth longer than trees — about 400 million years.
You can fit every other planet in our solar system between the Earth and the Moon.
There are more trees on Earth (~3 trillion) than stars in the Milky Way (~400 billion).
The human body contains enough iron to make a 3-inch nail.
Bananas are technically berries. Strawberries are not.
Oxford University is older than the Aztec Empire.
The inventor of the Pringles can is buried in one.
Wombat poop is cube-shaped. This has been peer-reviewed.
A group of flamingos is called a 'flamboyance.'
The national animal of Scotland is the unicorn.
The shortest war in history lasted 38 minutes — between Britain and Zanzibar in 1896.
There are more fake flamingos in the world than real ones.
A single bolt of lightning contains enough energy to toast 100,000 slices of bread.
Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins — up to 40 minutes.
The entire world's population could fit inside Los Angeles if standing shoulder to shoulder.
An octopus has its brain wrapped around its esophagus. If it eats something too large, it can get brain damage.
Cows have best friends and get stressed when they are separated.
The loudest animal on Earth is the sperm whale at 230 decibels — louder than a jet engine.
If the Sun were the size of a front door, Earth would be the size of a nickel.
Your stomach acid is strong enough to dissolve metal. Your stomach lining replaces itself every 3-4 days to survive.
The total weight of all ants on Earth is roughly equal to the total weight of all humans.
A jiffy is an actual unit of time: 1/100th of a second.
The Voyager 1 spacecraft is over 15 billion miles from Earth and still sending data.
Humans share about 60% of their DNA with bananas.
The average cumulus cloud weighs about 1.1 million pounds.
Russia has a larger surface area than Pluto.
There are more ways to arrange a standard deck of 52 cards than there are atoms on Earth.
Mammals all take roughly the same number of breaths in a lifetime — about 200 million.
The total length of capillaries in an adult human body is about 60,000 miles.
Photons from the Sun's core take about 100,000 years to reach its surface, then 8 minutes to reach Earth.
The Great Wall of China is not visible from space with the naked eye, but highways are.
Coconuts kill more people per year than sharks.
A day on Mercury lasts 59 Earth days, but a year is only 88.
The longest hiccuping spree lasted 68 years. Charles Osborne hiccuped from 1922 to 1990.
Tardigrades (water bears) can survive in the vacuum of space, radiation levels 1,000x lethal to humans, and temperatures near absolute zero.
The distance from your wrist to your elbow is the same as the length of your foot.
There are more bacteria in your mouth than there are people on Earth.
The dot over the letters 'i' and 'j' is called a tittle.
A person produces enough saliva in their lifetime to fill two swimming pools.
The Eiffel Tower can grow up to 6 inches taller during the summer due to heat expanding the iron.
The human nose can detect over 1 trillion different scents.
Nintendo was founded in 1889 — as a playing card company.
There are more possible combinations of a Rubik's Cube (43 quintillion) than there are grains of sand on Earth.
If you drilled a tunnel through the Earth and jumped in, it would take about 42 minutes to reach the other side.
